ksa_text: Knowledge of enterprise risk management integration, including how data risk, AI risk, model risk, and technology risk roll up into enterprise risk taxonomy and board-level reporting.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Risks and benefits are mapped for all components of the AI system including third-party software and data.

top_anchors.element_label: Risks and benefits are mapped for all components of the AI system including third-party software and data.
Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Risk Management is a primary or secondary domain for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. This knowledge KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (senior specialist).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Risk Management), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.509). External reviewers may question whether this specific knowledge KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: ISO 31000, NIST RMF, and enterprise risk management frameworks confirm risk management competencies for senior data leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Risk Management appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Data and AI Strategy Consultant.

decision_rationale: Risk Management knowledge KSA is within scope for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant at the senior specialist tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
